text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, Special Week's debut is just
moments away.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Oh, s-sorry! I'm just a little awestruck by
the atmosphere here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But now's not the time to be getting all nervous,
is it?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna take my very first step towards
becoming the top Umamusume in all of Japan!
